name: Thai Satay with Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Pork or chicken, sliced into strips 1 inch X 4 inches and 1/4 inch thick
3/4 cup Thick coconut milk for basting meat while cooking
40 Bamboo skewers (soak in water before using)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread the pork or chicken onto the bamboo skewers.
2. Heat a pan over medium heat and cook the meat until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
3. Brush the coconut milk over the meat to baste it while cooking.
4. Once cooked through, remove from heat and set aside.
5. Mix together peanut sauce ingredients: 1 cup roasted peanuts, 1/2 cup soy sauce, 1 tbsp chili paste, 1 tsp sugar, and 1/4 cup water.
6. Combine all the ingredients for the peanut sauce until smooth.
7. Serve the satay with the spicy peanut sauce on the side.
